title: coleus mutabilis
intro: Coleus mutabilis, also known as the butterfly plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of Coleus mutabilis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Coleus mutabilis are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
